description: Capture of birds with nets for banding and collection of biometric data.
recommended_uses: Survival studies, site fidelity and movement studies, population monitoring and demographic dynamics, collection of biometric data and biological samples, molt, age, and sex studies

description: Use of specific traps (e.g., cages, pitfall traps, funnel traps) for temporary capture of birds without the use of nets.
recommended_uses: Terrestrial or granivorous species, environments where mist nets are less efficient, behavioral or individual marking studies

description: Systematic observation of an open or semi-open area, scanning the field of view with binoculars or telescope to record all individuals detected.
recommended_uses: Open environments (grasslands, marshes, restingas), flock counts, monitoring of conspicuous species

description: Observer travels a route, recording birds along the way.
recommended_uses: Community monitoring at local and regional scales, comparison of richness and abundance between areas, rapid surveys in environmental gradients, protocols compatible with eBird and other citizen science systems

description: Route with recording of perpendicular or radial distances to estimate detectability and population density.
recommended_uses: Density studies, detection models (Distance Sampling), open or semi-open environments

description: Recording of birds within a fixed-width strip along a route, allowing density estimates.
recommended_uses: Open environments, density studies, comparisons between habitats

description: Linear route with continuous recording of all birds detected, without strip delimitation.
recommended_uses: Rapid inventories, community monitoring, environments with good visibility

description: Observer remains at a fixed point for a defined period, recording all birds seen or heard.
recommended_uses: Standardized monitoring, comparison between sites, relative abundance studies

description: Observations made within a defined geographic area, with standardized search effort.
recommended_uses: Comparison between areas, long-term monitoring, habitat use studies

description: Intensive search in a delimited area, aiming to record all individuals present.
recommended_uses: Complete censuses, monitoring of rare species, islands, small fragments, isolated areas

description: Identification and counting of birds from images or videos obtained in the field or remotely.
recommended_uses: Hard-to-access environments, large flocks, behavioral studies

description: Use of recorded sounds to attract birds and facilitate detection.
recommended_uses: Cryptic or territorial species, forest inventories, behavioral response studies

description: Old records or from secondary sources, without standardized effort.
recommended_uses: Historical reconstruction of distribution, complement to inventories, studies of temporal changes

description: Free recording of species without standardized effort.
recommended_uses: Initial inventories, opportunistic records, sampling complement

description: Recording of all species observed in a fixed time interval.
recommended_uses: Comparison between areas, rapid monitoring, standardized effort protocols

description: Qualitative records divided into time blocks (e.g., 10 min).
recommended_uses: Temporal monitoring, activity analysis, comparison between periods

description: Sequential lists of fixed size (e.g., 10 species), restarted when completed.
recommended_uses: Rapid inventories, comparison between habitats, richness monitoring

description: Spatial mapping method of territorial individuals throughout the breeding season.
recommended_uses: Territorial density studies, monitoring of resident species, small or medium areas

description: Systematic monitoring of active nests to record reproductive success.
recommended_uses: Breeding studies, monitoring of sensitive species, environmental impact assessment

description: Use of autonomous recorders to capture vocalizations over long periods.
recommended_uses: Continuous monitoring, nocturnal or secretive species, remote environments

description: Recording of vocalizations from migratory birds at night, usually with directional microphones.
recommended_uses: Migration monitoring, phenology studies, identification of migratory routes

description: Opportunistic records made without a defined protocol.
recommended_uses: Complement to lists, records of rare species, participatory monitoring

description: Use of automatic cameras to record presence and behavior of birds.
recommended_uses: Terrestrial species, closed environments, behavioral and presence studies

description: Counting points distributed along roads or highways, usually with motorized transportation between points.
recommended_uses: Large-scale monitoring, raptors and edge species, regional census protocols

description: Fixed point focused on auditory detection, usually with standardized time and no movement.
recommended_uses: Closed environments (forests), vocal species, richness and abundance monitoring

description: Fixed point with recording of radial or perpendicular distances to estimate detectability.
recommended_uses: Distance Sampling, density studies, environments with good distance perception

description: Fixed point recording each individual or group separately, including information such as height, flight direction, and behavior.
recommended_uses: Behavioral studies, local migration monitoring, environments with high aerial activity

description: Counts carried out at sea, usually with a vessel in motion.
recommended_uses: Monitoring of seabirds, studies of oceanic distribution, biodiversity surveys

description: Transect with individualized recording of each detection, including height, direction, and behavior.
recommended_uses: Behavioral studies, local migration monitoring, environments with high aerial activity
